hero.subtitle:
Spiritual and metaphysical author. Revelations from beyond
that transform the understanding of existence.

author.label: The Author
author.title: A life on the threshold of the invisible
author.bio_1: Andrew Myer experienced a deep connection with the spiritual world from an early age.
author.bio_2: His near-death experience during the COVID-19 pandemic revealed extraordinary truths about realities beyond the physical world.
author.bio_3: Trained in theology, philosophy, and psychology, he dedicates his life to sharing the teachings received from the other side.
author.quote: "The truths I brought back from the other side cannot be silenced. The universe insists they be shared."

thought.label: Thought & Influences
thought.title: Academic and intellectual roots
thought.subtitle: An interdisciplinary synthesis of classical philosophy, theology, and modern psychology.

pillars.title: Platonic and Aristotelian Philosophy
pillars.body: The search for the eternal within the temporal. The world of Ideas as the substrate of visible reality. Aristotle's notion of the soul as the form of the body, reinterpreted through mystical experience.

pillars.title: Christian and Esoteric Theology
pillars.body: The angelic fall as a metaphysical archetype. Redemption as a process of spiritual crystallization. Influences from Rhenish mysticism, Christian Kabbalah, and apophatic theology.

pillars.title: Psychology of the Ego and the Self
pillars.body: Narcissism as an ontological structure, not merely clinical. Jung, the collective unconscious, and archetypes. The near-death experience as ego disruption and threshold of the Self.

thought.central_quote: "Narcissism is not merely an individual pathology: it is the primordial law by which the universe contemplates itself and crystallizes matter."

books.label: The Work
books.title: Book Catalog
books.subtitle: Each work is a door toward a deeper understanding of existence.
books.placeholder_desc: A new work in preparation. Pure theology, philosophy, or spiritual psychology.

items.text: "Metaphysical narcissism is not man's self-love: it is the movement by which light bends upon itself and generates the illusion of an observer separate from the universe."
"Death is not a door closing. It is a mirror shattering — and in the fragments, for the first time, you see the whole."
"Before there was matter, before there was light, there was an act: the infinite contemplated itself. That is the First Law of Crystallization."
